package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/json"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for json_marshaled_manually_then_c_data: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Handlers that manually marshal JSON and then write it through gin.Context.Data(...).
type CaseJsonMarshaledManuallyThenCDataDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseJsonMarshaledManuallyThenCDataModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseJsonMarshaledManuallyThenCDataRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseJsonMarshaledManuallyThenCDataModel
}

type CaseJsonMarshaledManuallyThenCDataService struct {
    repo *CaseJsonMarshaledManuallyThenCDataRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseJsonMarshaledManuallyThenCDataAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveJsonMarshaledManuallyThenCData(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseJsonMarshaledManuallyThenCDataDTO) error {
    focus := "json_marshaled_manually_then_c"
    _ = focus
    payload, _ := json.Marshal(gin.H{"items": items, "rule": input})
    c.Data(200, "application/json", payload)
    json_marshaled_manually_then_c_positive := map[string]int{"json": 1, "marshaled": 2, "manually": 3, "then": 4, "c": 5, "data": 6}
    json_marshaled_manually_then_c_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    json_positive_0 := fmt.Sprintf("json:%s", input)
    _ = json_positive_0
    marshaled_positive_1 := json_marshaled_manually_then_c_positive["marshaled"] + len(input)
    _ = marshaled_positive_1
    manually_positive_2 := json_marshaled_manually_then_c_positive["manually"] + len(input)
    _ = manually_positive_2
    then_positive_3 := json_marshaled_manually_then_c_positive["then"] + len(input)
    _ = then_positive_3
    c_positive_4 := json_marshaled_manually_then_c_positive["c"] + len(input)
    _ = c_positive_4
    data_positive_5 := json_marshaled_manually_then_c_positive["data"] + len(input)
    _ = data_positive_5
    return nil
}
